login.headline: Manage Your Service Experience from One Platform
login.subline: Submit requests securely, track processes in real time, and stay seamlessly connected with the right teams.
login.welcomeSub: Sign in to your account to continue.
login.redirect: You will be redirected to your organization's secure sign-in page.

streamlined.label: Reliable Support Flow
streamlined.sub: Your requests are handled through an organized, traceable, and prioritized process.

routing.label: Fast Matching with the Right Team
routing.sub: Every request is routed to the most suitable team or expert based on topic and priority.

transparency.label: End-to-End Process Visibility
transparency.sub: Track every step transparently from ticket creation through to resolution.
